vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: The most captivating aspect of my course is the intellectual stimulation I receive from debating complex philosophical theories.
I find the practical application of abstract mathematical models in solving real-world economic problems to be incredibly fascinating.

vocab.meaning: đạt được sự hiểu biết sâu sắc về
vocab.example: Through my research, I’ve managed to gain insights into the intricate workings of human psychology.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt trong học thuật
vocab.example: While the academic rigor of this program is demanding, it’s also what makes the breakthroughs so rewarding.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí tiên phong/đầu sóng ngọn gió
vocab.example: Being at the forefront of biotechnological innovation is undoubtedly the most thrilling part of my laboratory work.

vocab.meaning: mang tính thay đổi tư duy/mô hình
vocab.example: Discovering paradigm-shifting concepts in quantum physics has completely altered my worldview.
I love the process of gathering empirical evidence to validate a hypothesis that seemed purely speculative at first.

vocab.meaning: được bình duyệt (bởi các chuyên gia cùng ngành)
vocab.example: Analyzing peer-reviewed journals allows me to engage with the highest level of discourse in my field.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng chân trời nhận thức của bản thân
vocab.example: Studying ancient civilizations has helped me broaden my cognitive horizons and appreciate historical continuity.

vocab.meaning: điểm mấu chốt của vấn đề
vocab.example: Getting to the crux of the matter in legal disputes is the challenge that keeps me hooked on law school.
